title: Metals gain as low inventories spark concerns of supply shortages
section_path: Metals gain as low inventories spark concerns of supply shortages
section_path_text: Metals gain as low inventories spark concerns of supply shortages
summary:
Main
By Daniel Hynes
Rising COVID-19 cases in China weighed on sentiment across commodity markets. This was offset in industrial commodity sectors by further falls in inventories. A weaker USD also helped support investor appetite.
